style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift upward like stardust, each particle refracting soft pastel light into iridescent rainbows. A delicate petal-shaped aura glows with a warm lavender hue, pulsing gently around Nidoking's form, while faint musical note vibrations shimmer in the air as delicate, translucent petals float in slow motion. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
